action.reasoning: Observation: Training completed 10 epochs, val_f1 improved from 0.3262 (epoch 3) to 0.3778 (epoch 10), but train_acc=95.4% vs val_acc=61.9% shows heavy overfitting. Training took ~2.4h for 10 epochs. Previous test macro_f1 was 0.2944. Analysis: Need to (1) submit eval for current best checkpoint to get test score, (2) add TTA to predict.py for free boost, (3) add EMA and stronger augmentation to reduce overfitting, (4) reduce training time per epoch. Decision: Submit eval now, then improve predict.py with TTA and retrain with EMA + MixUp + stronger regularization.
action.command: echo 'Checking checkpoint exists' && ls -la checkpoints/ && python -c "import torch; ckpt=torch.load('checkpoints/best.pt', map_location='cpu'); print('Keys:', list(ckpt.keys())); print('Best val_f1:', ckpt.get('best_val_f1', 'N/A')); print('Epoch:', ckpt.get('epoch', 'N/A'))"
